title: citrus iriomotensis
intro: Citrus iriomotensis, also known as Yagrumo Blanco, is a species of citrus plant native to the Iriomote Island in Japan. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, digestive issues, and even certain types of cancer, showcasing its potential as a natural remedy. Citrus iriomotensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
